title: arenaria armerina subsp. frigida
intro: Arenaria armerina subsp. frigida, also known as Frost Biting Stonecrop, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are derived from the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Frost Biting Stonecrop include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be applied topically or consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
